title: MCP Architecture, Negotiation, and Trust Boundaries · Skill Foundry
summary: Trace one tool call across host, client, server, and external system. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of an MCP architecture and threat-boundary diagram while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish host, per-server client, server, model, user, and external service responsibilities.
Trace initialization, capability negotiation, requests, responses, notifications, and errors.
Advertise and negotiate only implemented protocol capabilities.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
